_comment: Sensitive-path deny-list. These paths are checked FIRST by security hooks and audit skills. They are NON-OVERRIDABLE — no skill, agent, or hook may read, write, or reference these paths. Violations block the operation and surface a CRITICAL finding.
description: Hardcoded sensitive paths that must never be accessed by harness tools. Checked before any file operation. Non-overridable by allowlists or skill exceptions.

notes.~/.npmrc: Flagged only if it contains an auth token (//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=). Plain npmrc without tokens is safe.
notes.wildcards: Patterns ending in /* match all files under that directory. Patterns without wildcards match exact paths.
notes.expansion: The ~ prefix expands to $HOME at runtime. Hooks must expand before matching.

enforcement.check_order: FIRST — before any other path validation or allowlist checks
enforcement.on_match: Block the operation, log CRITICAL finding, exit non-zero
enforcement.override: NONE — these paths cannot be allowlisted by any mechanism
